creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I am running rstudio with USES=fortran:flang (a new option), and OPENBLAS=on.

The error is:
Error: package or namespace load failed for ‘stats’ in dyn.load(file, DLLpath = DLLpath, ...):
 unable to load shared object '/usr/local/lib/R/library/stats/libs/stats.so':
  Shared object "libRlapack.so" not found, required by "stats.so"
During startup - Warning message:
package ‘stats’ in options("defaultPackages") was not found 
Error in dyn.load(file, DLLpath = DLLpath, ...) : 
  unable to load shared object '/usr/local/lib/R/library/stats/libs/stats.so':
  Shared object "libRlapack.so" not found, required by "stats.so"


ldd output with USES=fortran:flang for some reason looks very different compared to USES=fortran:
./work/stage/usr/local/lib/R/library/stats/libs/stats.so:
        libflang.so => /usr/local/flang/lib/libflang.so (0x8012d5000)
        libexecinfo.so.1 => /usr/lib/libexecinfo.so.1 (0x801680000)
        libRlapack.so => not found (0)
        libflangrti.so => /usr/local/flang/lib/libflangrti.so (0x801883000)
        libompstub.so => /usr/local/flang/lib/libompstub.so (0x801a94000)
        libR.so => not found (0)
        libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x800824000)
        libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x801c99000)
        librt.so.1 => /usr/lib/librt.so.1 (0x801ec4000)
        libelf.so.2 => /lib/libelf.so.2 (0x8020c9000)
        libgcc_s.so.1 => /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 (0x8022e1000)
        libomp.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libomp.so.0 (0x8024ef000)
        libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x802776000)

libopenblasp.so.0 is missing, and libRlapack.so is present.
It appears that the patch in bug#220319 isn't sufficient.

Otherwise, with the current USES=fortran there is no problem. I first assumed that this was a general problem, sorry!
